feed.title: AXS CONTROLLER (R) (EC-AXS-SRAM-A1) — firmware
feed.subtitle: Production firmware releases for SRAM EC-AXS-SRAM-A1.

entry.title: AXS CONTROLLER (R) (EC-AXS-SRAM-A1) — firmware 2.55.1
entry.summary:
AXS CONTROLLER (R) EC-AXS-SRAM-A1 — firmware 2.55.1

Part: ES XX1

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - This firmware update contains minor bug fixes, platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements.

Released: 2026-06-23

entry.title: AXS CONTROLLER (R) (EC-AXS-SRAM-A1) — firmware 2.53.1
entry.summary:
AXS CONTROLLER (R) EC-AXS-SRAM-A1 — firmware 2.53.1

Part: ES XX1

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version from the app store to activate the following improvements. This firmware update contains minor bug fixes, platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements.

Released: 2025-09-09

entry.title: AXS CONTROLLER (R) (EC-AXS-SRAM-A1) — firmware 2.49.1
entry.summary:
AXS CONTROLLER (R) EC-AXS-SRAM-A1 — firmware 2.49.1

Part: ES XX1

* Minor Bug Fixes, Platform updates and reliability improvements * Default shift assignment added for wireless blips

Released: 2024-05-29

entry.title: AXS CONTROLLER (R) (EC-AXS-SRAM-A1) — firmware 2.42.0
entry.summary:
AXS CONTROLLER (R) EC-AXS-SRAM-A1 — firmware 2.42.0

Part: ES XX1

General bug fixes and reliability improvements.

Released: 2023-01-12

entry.title: AXS CONTROLLER (R) (EC-AXS-SRAM-A1) — firmware 2.7.8
entry.summary:
AXS CONTROLLER (R) EC-AXS-SRAM-A1 — firmware 2.7.8

Part: ES XX1

Supports regular SRAM production changes, contains no functional alterations or enhancements.

Released: 2022-12-14
